page.title: Billing
page.noAccess: Billing is managed by the organisation owner. Your account does not have access to billing.

dunning.softLockTitle: Payment has expired — some features are suspended.
dunning.softLockBody: Update your card below to restore full access.
dunning.readOnlyTitle: Subscription suspended — the portal is read-only.
dunning.readOnlyBody: Update your card to reactivate the account. Your data is safe.

title.one: Your free trial ends in {days} day.
title.few: Your free trial ends in {days} days.
title.other: Your free trial ends in {days} days.

trial.body: On {date} we'll charge {amount} to the card on file. Cancel any time before then.

none.title: No active subscription
none.body: Your organisation does not have a Tavli subscription yet. Start your 3-month free trial — you pay nothing until day 91.

actionsBar.portalUnavailable: The payment portal is unavailable right now.

changePlan.title: Change plan
changePlan.frequencyBodySuffix: . The change applies at the end of the period{periodEnd} — no charge now.
changePlan.toastTierLimit: You can't switch to Base with more than one location. Remove the additional locations first.
changePlan.toastTierFailed: The plan change didn't go through.
changePlan.toastFrequencyAppliedEnd: The change applies at the end of the period.
changePlan.toastFrequencyFailed: The frequency change didn't go through.

cancel.title: Cancel subscription
cancel.intro: Cancelling is a single click — no ticket, no retention call. We'll hand you a full export of your data.

reasons.missing_feature: A feature I need is missing

cancel.submitPeriodEnd: Stop billing at the end of the period
cancel.toastPeriodEnd: Your subscription will end at the end of the period. You have full access until then.
cancel.toastRefund: Subscription cancelled. We'll refund you €{amount} pro rata.
cancel.toastFailed: Cancellation didn't go through. Please try again.
